channel.title: 2026-03-06 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-03-06 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Anomalous Hall effect in a near room-temperature soft ferromagnet AlFe₂B₂
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Materials
👤 Xinxuan Lin, Yuansheng Bu, Jiawei Li, Shuyue Guan, Hongming Weng, and Shuang Jia
Author(s): Xinxuan Lin, Yuansheng Bu, Jiawei Li, Shuyue Guan, Hongming Weng, and Shuang Jia We report the anisotropic magnetization and the anomalous Hall effect (AHE) in single-crystalline AlFe₂B₂, which undergoes a ferromagnetic (FM) transition at 275 K. The intrinsic mechanism is essential for the AHE in the FM state, resulting in a significant anomalous Ha… [Phys. Rev. Materials 10, 034406] Published Fri Mar 06, 2026

item.title: Bi₂Se₃-based axion insulator as a platform for topological magnetoelectric and quantum anomalous Hall effects
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Materials
👤 Tatiana V. Menshchikova, Igor P. Rusinov, Evgueni K. Petrov, and Evgueni V. Chulkov
Author(s): Tatiana V. Menshchikova, Igor P. Rusinov, Evgueni K. Petrov, and Evgueni V. Chulkov We propose and theoretically demonstrate a platform for realizing both the axion insulator and quantum anomalous Hall (QAH) phases. This platform is a Bi₂Se₃-based topological insulator film that is confined between two out-of-plane magnetized films of MnBi_… [Phys. Rev. Materials 10, 034201] Published Fri Mar 06, 2026

item.title: Dynamical Response of Noncollinear Spin Systems at Constrained Magnetic Moments
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. X
👤 Miquel Royo and Massimiliano Stengel
Author(s): Miquel Royo and Massimiliano Stengel Constrained magnetic-moment simulations provide a stable and efficient framework for modeling coupled spin-lattice dynamics, enabling precise predictions of subgap optical responses in magnetic insulators. [Phys. Rev. X 16, 011049] Published Fri Mar 06, 2026

item.title: New Tool for Sculpting Single Photons
item.description:
📚 Physics
👤 Mark Buchanan
Author(s): Mark Buchanan Researchers can adjust the frequency and bandwidth of single photons inside an optical fiber, which will be useful for future quantum networks. [Physics 19, 32] Published Fri Mar 06, 2026
